images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol/influencer, 20‑something, flawless yet lifelike skin, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, silky straight black hair, posing in a golden‑lit rice paddy field at eye level.
